summary: Offence Type Integration Testing Complete. All 11 offence categories working correctly - API endpoints return correct data, case creation with offence types works, Dashboard dropdown shows all categories with dynamic offence type options, and Case Detail page displays offence badges correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/offence-categories returns correct structure (id, name, description, offences)
POST /api/cases with drug_offences category and Drug Supply type creates case correctly
POST /api/cases with assault category creates case correctly
POST /api/cases without offence fields defaults to homicide
PUT /api/cases/{id} updates offence category and type correctly
GET /api/offence-framework returns full framework with all 11 categories
Dashboard loads with New Case button
Offence Category selector shows all 11 categories
Offence Type selector dynamically updates based on selected category
Offence Type selector shows correct offences for drug_offences (5 options)
Case Detail page displays offence category badge (amber)
Case Detail page displays offence type badge (slate)

offence_categories_api.details: GET /api/offence-categories returns all 11 categories: homicide, assault, sexual_offences, robbery_theft, drug_offences, fraud_dishonesty, firearms_weapons, domestic_violence, public_order, terrorism, driving_offences

offence_framework_detail_api.details: GET /api/offence-framework/{category} returns detailed framework including nsw_legislation, cth_legislation, defences, key_elements. Returns 404 for invalid category.

case_creation_with_offence.details: Cases can be created with offence_category and offence_type fields. Default is homicide when not specified.

dashboard_offence_selector.details: New Case dialog has offence_category dropdown (data-testid='new-case-offence-category') showing all 11 categories with descriptions. offence_type dropdown (data-testid='new-case-offence-type') dynamically updates based on selected category.

case_detail_offence_badge.details: Case Detail page displays two badges: offence category in amber (bg-amber-50 text-amber-700) and specific offence type in slate (bg-slate-50 text-slate-700)

critical_code_review_comments: Offence framework integration is well-structured with OFFENCE_CATEGORIES constant in offence_framework.py
API endpoints properly expose category data and detailed framework information
Frontend Dashboard correctly fetches categories and dynamically updates offence type options
Case model properly stores offence_category and offence_type with sensible defaults
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_offence_framework.py - Created new test file with 11 tests for offence framework
test_credentials: Created and cleaned up during testing
seed_data_creation: Test case 'R v Test - Drug Appeal' created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offence type integration fully tested and working. All 11 offence categories available via public API endpoints. Case creation and display with offence types working correctly. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_offence_framework.py available for regression testing.
